segments.text: How scary Samsora is in this percent range, that used to be really the character's X-Factor.
Seeing that taken away is interesting, because she still does everything else just as well.
Right, and it doesn't change up Samsora's game plan in the least bit!

full_text: How scary Samsora is in this percent range, that used to be really the character's X-Factor. Seeing that taken away is interesting, because she still does everything else just as well. Right, and it doesn't change up Samsora's game plan in the least bit! Ooh, the back air!
